_note: Operational validation rules for the AI Health Guardian rule engine. Rules applied in priority order.

validation_rules.action: REJECT image. Return: 'Image quality too low to read safely. Please retake in better lighting or try manual entry.'

validation_rules.condition: No expiry date pattern matched in OCR output
validation_rules.action: FLAG as 'Expiry date not readable'. Ask user to manually enter expiry date. Do not block medicine lookup.
BLOCK and warn: 'This medicine appears to be EXPIRED. Do not use. Please consult a pharmacist.'

validation_rules.condition: Scanned medicine name matches no record in medicines.json (after alias lookup)
validation_rules.action: Ask user: 'We could not identify this medicine. Please enter the generic/salt name printed on the strip, or consult a pharmacist.'

validation_rules.condition: Scanned medicine name matches 2 or more records with similarity score > 0.80
validation_rules.action: Present all matches to user. Ask: 'Which medicine is this?' Show brand name, salt, strength. Wait for confirmation before proceeding.

validation_rules.condition: Scanned medicine + any medicine in user profile has interaction severity = 'dangerous' in interactions.json
validation_rules.action: WARN prominently in red: 'DANGER: This medicine may have a serious interaction with [medicine_b]. Please consult your doctor before taking.'

validation_rules.condition: Scanned medicine + any medicine in user profile has interaction severity = 'caution'
validation_rules.action: WARN in amber: 'CAUTION: This medicine may interact with [medicine_b]. Monitor for [clinical_reason]. Consult your doctor if unsure.'

validation_rules.condition: Scanned medicine has absolute contraindication for any condition in user's profile
validation_rules.action: BLOCK: 'WARNING: This medicine is generally NOT recommended for people with [condition]. Please consult your doctor before use.'

validation_rules.condition: Scanned medicine has caution-level contraindication for user's condition
validation_rules.action: WARN: 'CAUTION: People with [condition] should use this medicine carefully. A dose adjustment may be needed. Please check with your doctor.'

validation_rules.condition: User is pregnant AND medicine has pregnancy_safe = false OR pregnancy_rules.json risk_level = CONTRAINDICATED
validation_rules.action: BLOCK: 'This medicine is NOT safe during pregnancy. Please consult your doctor or gynecologist immediately.'

validation_rules.condition: User is pregnant AND medicine has pregnancy_rules.json risk_level contains 'CAUTION'
validation_rules.action: WARN: 'Use of this medicine during pregnancy requires medical supervision. Please consult your doctor before taking.'

validation_rules.condition: User has allergy in profile AND medicine's allergy_type in allergies.json matches user's documented allergy
validation_rules.action: BLOCK: 'You have a documented allergy to [allergy_type]. This medicine should NOT be taken. Please consult your doctor for a safe alternative.'

validation_rules.condition: OCR output contains any keyword from not_for_sale_keywords.json
validation_rules.action: FLAG: 'This medicine may be a government supply item and may not be intended for retail purchase. Please verify with your pharmacist or healthcare provider.'

validation_rules.condition: Drug interaction found but confidence_level = MEDIUM or LOW
validation_rules.action: Show interaction warning but mark as 'Uncertain interaction — please verify with your doctor or pharmacist'
INFORM: 'This is a prescription medicine. It should only be used under the supervision of a licensed doctor.'

validation_rules.condition: Scanned medicine exists in alternatives.json AND jan_aushadhi_equivalent is not null AND user preference is show_alternatives = true
validation_rules.action: INFORM: 'A Jan Aushadhi equivalent is available for this medicine at significantly lower cost. Ask your pharmacist about [jan_aushadhi_equivalent].'

validation_rules.condition: User has not completed profile (conditions, allergies not set)
validation_rules.action: WARN: 'Your health profile is incomplete. Safety checks may not be fully accurate. Please complete your profile for personalised safety analysis.'
